---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Publications | Chaire CARA"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---


```{r echo = FALSE, results = "asis", message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

load("rda_files/Publis.Rda")
```


::: {.cara-publications-page}

::: {.cara-page-hero}

![](img/UQAMp3.jpg){fig-alt="Campus de l’UQAM"}

::: {.cara-page-hero-text}
::: {.cara-kicker}
Recherche · Chaire CARA
:::

# Publications

Cette section présente les articles scientifiques publiés par les membres de la Chaire Co-operators en analyse des risques actuariels dans le cadre de leurs travaux de recherche.
:::

:::


::: {.cara-publications-section}

## Publications récentes

::: {.cara-publication-list}

```{r echo = FALSE, results = "asis", message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
publis <- Publis %>%
  filter(Année >= 2019, Etat != "Projet", is.na(Exclu)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Année))

template <- "
<div class='cara-publication-item'>
  <div class='cara-publication-title'>%s</div>
  <div class='cara-publication-authors'>%s</div>
  <div class='cara-publication-journal'><em>%s</em> %s</div>
</div>\n"

if (nrow(publis) > 0) {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(publis))) {
    current <- publis[i, ]

    lien <- ifelse(is.na(current$Lien), "", current$Lien)
    auteurs <- ifelse(is.na(current$AllAuteurs), "", current$AllAuteurs)
    journal <- ifelse(is.na(current$Journal2), "", current$Journal2)
    pages <- ifelse(is.na(current$Pages), "", current$Pages)

    cat(sprintf(template, lien, auteurs, journal, pages))
  }
}
```

:::

:::


::: {.cara-publications-section .cara-publications-old}

<details>
<summary>Publications plus anciennes</summary>

::: {.cara-publication-list}

```{r echo = FALSE, results = "asis", message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
publis_old <- Publis %>%
  filter(Année < 2019, Etat != "Projet") %>%
  arrange(desc(Année))

template <- "
<div class='cara-publication-item'>
  <div class='cara-publication-title'>%s</div>
  <div class='cara-publication-authors'>%s</div>
  <div class='cara-publication-journal'><em>%s</em> %s</div>
</div>\n"

if (nrow(publis_old) > 0) {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(publis_old))) {
    current <- publis_old[i, ]

    lien <- ifelse(is.na(current$Lien), "", current$Lien)
    auteurs <- ifelse(is.na(current$AllAuteurs), "", current$AllAuteurs)
    journal <- ifelse(is.na(current$Journal2), "", current$Journal2)
    pages <- ifelse(is.na(current$Pages), "", current$Pages)

    cat(sprintf(template, lien, auteurs, journal, pages))
  }
}
```

:::

</details>

:::

:::
